script.source: def p99 = ctx.payload.aggregations.latency_percentiles.values['99.0']; if (p99 == null) { return false; } ctx.vars.p99 = p99; ctx.vars.severity = p99 > 5000 ? 'critical' : (p99 > 2000 ? 'warning' : 'ok'); return p99 > 2000;

def p50 = ctx.payload.aggregations.latency_percentiles.values['50.0']; def p95 = ctx.payload.aggregations.latency_percentiles.values['95.0']; def p99 = ctx.vars.p99; def severity = ctx.vars.severity; def threshold = severity == 'critical' ? 5000 : 2000; def msg = severity.toUpperCase() + ': p99 API latency is ' + Math.round(p99) + 'ms (threshold: ' + threshold + 'ms) over the last 5 minutes. p50=' + Math.round(p50) + 'ms, p95=' + Math.round(p95) + 'ms.'; return ['severity': severity, 'metric': 'API_Latency', 'p50': Math.round(p50), 'p95': Math.round(p95), 'p99': Math.round(p99), 'threshold': threshold, 'window': '5m', 'message': msg];

email.subject: [{{ctx.payload.severity | upper}}] AnchorPoint API Latency Alert — p99 {{ctx.payload.p99}}ms

metadata.description: Fires a warning alert when p99 API latency exceeds 2000ms, and a critical alert when it exceeds 5000ms. Evaluates every 1 minute over a 5-minute rolling window.

recovery.message: RESOLVED: p99 API latency has returned below threshold.
